qa_pairs.question: What is the persistent storage limit for RAS cloud resources?
qa_pairs.answer: The persistent storage limit for RAS cloud resources is 10 TB.

qa_pairs.question: What is the object storage limit for RAS cloud resources?
qa_pairs.answer: The object storage limit for RAS cloud resources is 10 TB.

qa_pairs.question: What is the shared filesystem storage limit for RAS cloud resources?
qa_pairs.answer: The shared filesystem storage limit for RAS cloud resources is 10 TB.

qa_pairs.question: What is the default duration for compute instances under the Rapid Access Service (RAS)?
qa_pairs.answer: The default duration for compute instances under RAS is one year, with a one-month wall-time.

qa_pairs.question: What is the default duration for persistent instances under the Rapid Access Service (RAS)?
qa_pairs.answer: The default duration for persistent instances under RAS is one year and they are renewable.

qa_pairs.question: Why is the default duration for RAS cloud allocations set to one year?
qa_pairs.answer: This is to align with the Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) allocation period of April-March.

qa_pairs.question: When is the default renewal period for RAS cloud allocations?
qa_pairs.answer: The default renewal period for RAS cloud allocations is in April.

qa_pairs.question: How can a user request Rapid Access Service (RAS) resources?
qa_pairs.answer: To request RAS, users need to fill out the provided Google Form.

qa_pairs.question: What is the URL for the Rapid Access Service (RAS) request form?
qa_pairs.answer: The URL for the RAS request form is https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeU_BoRk5cEz3AvVLf3e9yZJq-OvcFCQ-mg7p4AWXmUkd5rTw/viewform.
